name: Tata Neu Infinity SBI Card
exclusions: transactions excluded under Tata Neu Infinity SBI Card terms
milestoneBenefits: Annual fee reversal on annual spends of Rs 3 lakh or more
8 domestic lounge visits per year, 2 per quarter, subject to Rs 75,000 spend in previous quarter
additionalBenefits: 1,499 NeuCoins as welcome benefit within 15 days of joining fee realization
Up to 10% NeuCoins on select categories on Tata Neu App/Website
5% NeuCoins on non-EMI spends at Tata Neu and partner Tata Brands
1.5% NeuCoins on all other eligible spends including UPI transactions on RuPay variant
UPI NeuCoins capped at 500 NeuCoins per month
4 international lounge visits per year, 1 per quarter, with Priority Pass membership
Complimentary Priority Pass membership valid for 2 years
1% fuel surcharge waiver on transactions from Rs 500 to Rs 4,000, capped at Rs 500 per statement cycle
